topics.title: Jeff Conaway and Howard Stern Radio Segment
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Jeff Conaway’s appearance on Celebrity Fit Club, the performance of Heath Ledger in Casanova, and an analysis of Steve Jimus's media presence.

topics.title: Radio Show Production and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding guest ages, celebrity relationships, and technical coordination for upcoming segments.

topics.title: Radio Production Logistics and Schwarzenegger Interview
topics.summary: The studio records a discussion regarding technical transition plans for satellite broadcasting followed by an interview with an impersonator of Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger concerning his stance on same-sex marriage.

topics.title: Governor Schwarzenegger and George Takei Interview
topics.summary: The studio features an exchange between the host, George Takei, and California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger regarding gay marriage, personal opinions on film, and a humorous segment involving a listener from Oklahoma.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Expansion and Canadian Petition
topics.summary: The studio discusses a petition from a Canadian listener to bring the show to Sirius Canada and addresses the business implications of satellite radio availability.

topics.title: Staff Revelations and Show Segments
topics.summary: The studio explores a series of personal revelations from staff members while discussing upcoming show segments and the impact of listener engagement.

topics.title: Military Skit and Hollywood Anecdotes
topics.summary: The show features a comedic military skit involving 'Private Snowball' and 'Private Piles,' followed by a discussion on celebrity news, the success of director Eli Roth, and the transition from terrestrial radio to Sirius.

topics.title: Super Twink Film Critique
topics.summary: The studio critiques the poor production quality and lack of humor in a short film titled Super Twink.

topics.title: Critique of 'Supertwink' and Satellite Radio Transition
topics.summary: The studio discusses the poor production quality of the film "Supertwink" while Howard Stern reflects on the media coverage and public perception surrounding his move to satellite radio.

topics.title: Transition to Satellite Radio
topics.summary: The studio discusses the move to satellite radio, addressing listener feedback regarding content, the lack of available hardware, and the addition of new cast members.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Channels and Guest Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses various satellite radio music channels before transitioning to an interview with a guest named Larry regarding his personal life and relationships.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Transition and Interview Highlights
topics.summary: The studio explores the transition to satellite radio, discusses a listener's relationship dynamics, and reviews an interview with a porn star that was interrupted by Gary Garver.

topics.title: Awards Show Coverage and News Updates
topics.summary: The studio reviews footage from the AVN Awards, discusses a guest appearance by George Lopez at the People's Choice Awards, and covers news regarding a Turkish prisoner release and local censorship issues.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of entertainment topics including Julia Roberts' marriage, the Broadway success of Phantom of the Opera, Kelly Clarkson's career, and Lindsay Lohan's reaction to a Vanity Fair article.
